# Podcast Marketing Strategy Guide: Tips, Challenges & Solutions

![Two podcast hosts sitting in armchairs, speaking into professional microphones.](https://helloaudio.fm/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Podcast-Marketing-Strategy-1-1024x683.webp)
![](https://helloaudio.fm/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/NoraSudduthHelloAudio.png)

## Table of Contents - Click to Skip

Do you know over [6 million](https://backlinko.com/podcast-stats) podcasts are streaming worldwide right now? ThatвҖҷs tough competition.

So, having a podcast with a vision is great, but what good is it if you donвҖҷt have an audience?

Apart from quality content, you have to plan a marketing strategy to attract listeners and build a loyal community. Podcast marketing comprises many factors, like consistent content creation, audience engagement, and structured distribution.В 

While reaching out to customers may be easy, the real challenge of marketing lies in strategically building an online presence for your podcast for lasting success.В 

In this article, weвҖҷll dive into podcast marketing strategies and expert tips to help you market your podcast effectively.В 

If you want to build a podcast and capture the market strategically, reach out to Hello Audio. Our user-friendly platform lets you repurpose existing content into private podcasts and distribute them to popular podcast apps like Overcast, Spotify, and more.В 

[Sign up today](https://app.helloaudio.fm/signup) and start reaching your target audience.

## **What is Podcast Marketing?**

Podcast marketing is building and implementing effective strategies to boost the reach, increase engagement, and grow your podcastвҖҷs audience.В 

The purpose of podcast marketing is to bring consistent growth rather than immediate results. You need to understand that podcasting is a long-term game and to bring lasting growth, you need to make consistent efforts.В 

Marketing can include anything, like using social media platforms or inviting a known figure for an interview to reach a wider audience.В 

Effective podcast marketing demands regular content production and strategically promoting the produced content to reach more audiences.В 

The goal is to make your voice heard and build a loyal listener base among millions of others; podcast marketing will do that for you.В 

![Home recording studio with a condenser mic, laptop, and open agenda.](https://helloaudio.fm/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/What-is-Podcast-Marketing-1024x683.webp)

## **What Makes Podcast Marketing Challenging?**

Despite the benefits of podcast promotion, you can still face several challenges.

LetвҖҷs look at them and the [podcast tips](https://helloaudio.fm/podcast-tips/) for overcoming them:

### **1. Podcast Marketing Measurement and Analytics**

ItвҖҷs not easy to track the performance, conversions, and return on investment of your podcast promotion efforts. The [podcast metrics](https://helloaudio.fm/podcast-metrics/) often depend on the podcast app that hosts the show and tracks basic listener data, such as completion rate and playtime. Podcasters donвҖҷt get detailed data on web and social media marketing.

**Solution**: Use a combination of tools and methods to measure your marketing efforts, including analytics platforms like [Podtrac](https://analytics.podtrac.com/) and special coupon codes.

### **2. Market Saturation**

With over [4.5 million](https://podcastindex.org/stats) podcasts, it makes it harder for your podcast marketing strategies to stand out.

**Solution**: To succeed in your podcast marketing strategy, have a clear understanding of your audience and have a unique value proposition.

### **3. Organic Podcast Discoverability**

Another major challenge in podcast promotion is that your show wonвҖҷt be easily searchable and discoverable by keywords and tags. Additionally, the discoverability algorithms in major apps like Spotify and Google Podcasts often favor popular shows with large audiences, making it challenging for your new podcasts to gain the вҖҳfeaturedвҖҷ status.

**Solution**: You can increase your showвҖҷs visibility on search engines and podcast directories by creating compelling titles and descriptions for your show. You can use episode transcriptions, eye-catching artwork, and SEO-optimized podcast show notes.

![Man recording a podcast using Anchor on a desktop computer.](https://helloaudio.fm/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/What-Makes-Podcast-Marketing-Challenging-1024x683.webp)

## **Benefits of Implementing a Strong Podcast Marketing Strategy**

Implementing a strong podcast marketing strategy offers numerous benefits:

![Podcasting studio with condenser mic and audio interface.](https://helloaudio.fm/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Benefits-of-Implementing-a-Strong-Podcast-Marketing-Strategy-1024x683.webp)

## **How to Create an Effective Podcast Marketing Strategy**

An effective marketing strategy involves getting your content across to the right audience and gaining traction over time.

HereвҖҷs how you can create a strategy that will enhance your podcastвҖҷs reach:

### **Define Your Target Audience**

Your listeners are the key elements of your marketing strategyвҖҷs success, and to reach them, you need to understand what they want. Craft your content to resonate with them.

Define your demographics, such as the ages you are targeting and their interests, location, or profession. Also, identify their pain points and research where theyвҖҷre getting their entertainment or information from, like through social media or websites, so that you can tailor your marketing.В 

### **Submit Your Podcast to Multiple Directories**

Getting your podcast listed on popular directories like [Apple Podcasts](https://www.apple.com/apple-podcasts/), [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/), and [Amazon Music](https://music.amazon.com/) will increase visibility and allow potential listeners to find and subscribe to your series.В 

Once you get into the directory, optimize the information, such as the podcast title and description, and the episode title and description.

These [podcast platforms](https://helloaudio.fm/podcast-platforms/) also give you data like how many active listeners you have, your subscribers, and what other podcasts match your content, which you can use to strategize better.В 

You can also leverage smaller podcast directories like Overcast, Pocket Casts, and TuneIn to tap into niche audiences.В 

### **Promote Your Podcast on Social Media**

Social media has a diverse consumer base, which can increase visibility and audience engagement. First, you need a dedicated account for your podcast on [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/), [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/), X (Twitter), or [TikTok](https://www.tiktok.com/en/).

There, you can share audiograms and video snippets to promote your episodes and use engaging captions to attract more visibility. Another interesting way is to add behind-the-scenes content like photos and videos to give a snippet into the creation process.

Engage with your audience through comments, Q&As, live sessions, and interactive stories.

### **Leverage Influencer and Industry Partnerships**

Reach out to influencers in your niche and ask them if they would like to [promote your podcast](https://helloaudio.fm/how-to-promote-a-podcast/) or come as a guest on your show.В 

First, you need to identify niche influencers, bloggers, and thought leaders who align with your podcastвҖҷs theme. Then, get a good idea of what they do and understand their audience.В 

Now, create a personalized message highlighting why your podcast is a good fit for them to build a mutually beneficial relationship.В 

Provide easy-to-share content, like pull quotes and episode snippets, to make it simple for them to promote your show.В 

![Recording a podcast episode with two men in headphones and microphones, professional studio environment.](https://helloaudio.fm/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/How-to-Create-an-Effective-Podcast-Marketing-Strategy-1024x683.webp)

### **Track Performance and Improve**

Monitor your podcastвҖҷs performance by using tools like Apple Podcast Connect, Spotify for Podcasters, and Chartable to track downloads and listener behavior.

You can use the date to refine your marketing efforts for better results. You should also monitor social media engagement and website traffic to see which promotional strategies are working best.В 

Research what your listeners are saying about your podcast, and use the feedback to update your content to better suit their needs.

### **Build Relationships with Other Podcasters**

There will be other podcasters from your niche, and collaborating with them will help you tap into their audience base.В 

You can invite them to co-host a special episode or ask them to promote your podcast on their show. However, finding a podcaster with the same tone and style as you is paramount.В 

Once you reach out to them and build a relationship, cross-promote each otherвҖҷs series through social media or websites.В 

### **Optimize for SEO**

SEO strategies donвҖҷt only work for websites or blogs; they can improve your podcastвҖҷs visibility and engagement as well. SEO helps people find your channel organically by focusing on keyword-rich titles and descriptions.В 

Write detailed [show notes of your podcast](https://helloaudio.fm/podcast-show-notes/) that include key discussion points, timestamps, and links. You should also optimize your website content and social media posts related to the show with relevant keywords and backlinks.

### **Repurpose Content Across Multiple Platforms**

Publishing your podcast content across multiple platforms allows you to reach diverse audiences.В 

[Repurposing content](https://helloaudio.fm/how-to-repurpose-content/) into blog articles, LinkedIn posts, or X (Twitter) threads helps attract readers who prefer text-based content over audio.В 

Transform episodes into infographics and carousels with key takeaways, which will make the information easily digestible on visual platforms like Instagram and Pinterest.В 

Turning them into short-form video clips allows you to easily share them on YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram reels, which can attract even more new listeners.

You can also transcribe your episodes and publish them as blog posts (it will also boost search rankings).

### **Build a Podcast Website**

Creating a website specifically for your podcast will bring more traction to your channel, and itвҖҷs also a great way to share more information about your series.В 

You can add show notes, relevant information, and updates about your podcast, increasing its credibility. You can also publish [transcripts of your podcast](https://helloaudio.fm/transcript-of-podcast/) episode for your listeners.

Add an embedded player so visitors can access your episodes directly from your site. Also, include an email sign-up form to collect leads and notify subscribers about new updates.

Use blog content to drive organic traffic through SEO and enhance discoverability.В 

### **Leverage Email Marketing**

If youвҖҷre looking to build a strong community, email is the way to go. You can regularly send them notifications about new episodes, or you can save some bonus content, early access to episodes, or personalized recommendations specifically for subscribers.В 

Send weekly or monthly newsletters with insights and behind-the-scenes updates, with engaging subject lines and visuals to increase open rates and listener retention.В 

Follow the above steps for an efficient and effective podcast marketing strategy.В 

Now, if youвҖҷre looking for an easier way to create podcasts, Hello Audio has got you covered. On our platform, you can turn your existing audio and video content into podcast feeds and get them auto-published on major hosting sites like Apple Podcasts, reaching your audience on their favorite apps.В

## **Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)**

Here are some commonly asked questions about podcast marketing thatвҖҷll help you build an effective strategy:

### **Is Podcast Marketing Different for Businesses vs. Hobbyists?**

Yes.

[Audio marketing](https://helloaudio.fm/audio-marketing/), when itвҖҷs for business vs. if you were a hobbyist. ItвҖҷs because of the distinct goals, strategies, and success metrics.

### **How Long Does It Take to See Results From Podcast Marketing?**

It takes 3 to 12 months to see meaningful outcomes from your podcast marketing. For instance, [it takes 6 to 18 months to monetize your podcast](https://helloaudio.fm/how-long-does-it-take-for-a-podcast-to-make-money/).

### **What is the Ideal Length for a Podcast Episode?**

## **Conclusion**

Marketing a podcast demands a strategic approach that includes audience engagement, SEO optimization, social media promotion, and consistent branding to drive growth and visibility.

You can consistently refine your marketing efforts to achieve sustainable growth. Keep experimenting with your content to engage your audience and evolve with industry trends to ensure your podcast thrives in an increasingly competitive space.В

URL: https://www.quillpodcasting.com/blog-posts/branded-podcast-marketing-mistakes

SUMMARY:
1. Releasing press releases without an audio player В· 2. Relying solely on social media В· 3. A one-size-fits-all social media approach В· 4.

FULL CONTENT:
![Quill podcast marketplace logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5d6af44f068031b45b8e83a5/5df65befa58b622114d3dbe1_Group-2.png)

# 8 Branded Podcast Marketing Mistakes YouГўВҖВҷre Probably Making

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5dafa392fcdc196abf1f613a/645e7558e2914648c3af98a7_2023-04-27%2002_38_28.256%2B0900_4.jpg)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5dafa392fcdc196abf1f613a/654f918a88635290d9555da3_8%20Branded%20Podcast%20Marketing%20Mistakes%20You%E2%80%99re%20Probably%20MakingQuill%20Thumbnail.avif)

###### Contents

When we think of ГўВҖВңmarketing mistakesГўВҖВқ we commonly think of the dark rabbit hole where [PepsiГўВҖВҷs Kendall Jenner commercial](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uwvAgDCOdU4) and [Burger KingГўВҖВҷs International WomenГўВҖВҷs Day tweet](https://adage.com/article/marketing-news-strategy/burger-king-deletes-international-womens-day-tweet-after-getting-grilled-its-intent-misinterpreted/2320086#:~:text=Burger%20King%20U.K.%20tweeted%20out,%22We%20hear%20you.) live.ГӮ

\*shivers\*

But most of the time marketing mistakes arenГўВҖВҷt nearly as obvious or large-scale.

To be blunt, marketing anything well is a challenge. Success is hard-won and typically arrives after many grueling months of executing your marketing plan. After that, we then have to maintain those initiatives and the hard-earned momentum we've built.

In other words, itГўВҖВҷs safe to say that in todayГўВҖВҷs landscape, marketers have a lot on their plate.ГӮ

ГўВҖВҚ

## **Podcast marketing for branded showsГӮ**

With the rise of [branded podcasts](https://www.quillpodcasting.com/blog-posts/branded-podcast), thereГўВҖВҷs an additional channel for marketers to add to their plate: [podcast marketing](https://www.quillpodcasting.com/blog-posts/podcast-marketing).ГӮ

Podcast marketing is a newer concept to marketers and creators, and because of this, it can be confusing to know what tactics leverage and what ones to leave at the door when it comes to growing a show.ГӮ

ГўВҖВңFor brands with podcasts, creating the content is just the first step. ItГўВҖВҷs unlikely that people are actively searching for the podcast youГўВҖВҷre creating so you need to get it in front of them. Podcast marketing ensures your content reaches its intended audience effectively. In todayГўВҖВҷs marketing landscape, itГўВҖВҷs the brands that know how to create quality content, strategically position that content in front of their target audience, and then keep that audience coming back for more, that win.ГўВҖВқ

[Alison Osborne, VP of Marketing at Quill and CoHost](https://www.quillpodcasting.com/team/alison-osborne)

To help marketing teams out, our team at Quill Podcast Agency put together a list of 8 common branded podcast marketing mistakes we see shows making and also how to fix them.ГӮВ ГӮ

ГўВҖВҚ

## **1. Releasing press releases without an audio player**

Picture this: You've painstakingly crafted a compelling press release for your latest episode or season release. It's picked up by numerous outlets and even featured in mainstream publications.

Then, it all comes crashing down with the last line: "Find the show wherever you get your podcasts." WhatГўВҖВҷs missing? An embedded audio player!ГӮ

With the average human attention span steadily decreasing to [8.25 seconds](https://www.goldenstepsaba.com/resources/average-attention-span#:~:text=The%20average%20attention%20span%20of,span%20while%20using%20mobile%20devices.) (thatГўВҖВҷs nearly one second **less** than a goldfish), marketers need to make their CTAs as effortless as possible.ГӮ

That means, (when given the option) allow your audience to listen to your podcast right then and there. Offer a sneak peek, ideally a trailer, on your website and in press releases to eliminate barriers to sampling your content.

Or at the very least ensure that youГўВҖВҷve linked out to the listening apps where readers can tune in. DonГўВҖВҷt make them open the app themselves to search for you because they likely wonГўВҖВҷt.ГӮ

ГўВҖВҚ

## **2. Relying solely on social mediaГӮ**

While social media is a valuable tool, relying solely on it for promotion is a common mistake.ГӮ

Here are the top three ways people find their podcasts according to the [BBC and the University of York:](https://podnews.net/update/ury-research)

With this information in mind, word of mouth continues to reign supreme, but podcast advertising and ГўВҖВңmore like thisГўВҖВқ recommendations arenГўВҖВҷt far behind along with internet searches.ГӮ

To improve your discoverability and reach, consider diversifying your marketing mix. Here are some of our favorite strategies to leverage:

Social media can be a valuable tool for enabling word-of-mouth marketing but itГўВҖВҷs not the only tactic you should silo your podcast into.ГӮ

ГўВҖВҚ

## **3. A one-size-fits-all social media approachГӮ**

Each social media platform has distinctive features, interaction styles, and audiences that you should use to your advantage.

As a general rule, most people on social media aren't looking to consume entire episodes. They're more interested in bite-sized content that captures their attention quickly. Here are some ways to achieve this:

Additionally, depending on your target audience, the social media platforms you leverage will look a little different. Here are some things to keep in mind when it comes to the type of content most conducive to these platforms and their average user demographics:

And please, please, avoid simply posting the link to your episode with a caption along the lines of ГўВҖВңListen to the latest episode of \*insert podcast name\* where we talk to \*insert guest name\* about \*insert topic\*!ГўВҖВқГӮ

Just donГўВҖВҷt.ГӮ

As social media has evolved, users are looking for content that educates them, inspires them, evokes emotion, and overall, provides value. As you share your content, keep this at the forefront of your mind.ГӮ

A great example of promoting a branded podcast on social in a more value-driven way is with [The JuiceГўВҖВҷs](https://www.thejuicehq.com/) show, [Modern Day Marketer](https://open.spotify.com/show/7vdvpWnoUQx1g8pvT2d2kb?si=03dd860a67024c70).ГӮ

VP of Marketing at The Juice and host of Modern Day Marketer, Brett McGrath, always shares new episodes on LinkedIn but the focus of the post isnГўВҖВҷt even on getting someone to necessarily click on the episode. ItГўВҖВҷs on educating audiences, which a lot of the time, provides enough value to make them want to listen.ГӮ

HereГўВҖВҷs one of his posts from a few weeks back:ГӮ

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5dafa392fcdc196abf1f613a/654f7a82c2ebf709d9397729_E0srcDhPpItTLWCm1ZyenGCrghf2JWemUAWcYmTHzfFvtE4O2NQt59VeEy4WDdkOOEKm2eYS0-AjRAJyrZI488YDMsoLsWiVkxx2LlMghouXez1oMdyesKHqNzeNtMZPXWO8He4nxAD8Rj8IhfOys68.avif)

The opposite of boring, right?ГӮ

ГўВҖВҚ

## **4. Forgetting links, tags, and hashtags in your posts**

Going back to our earlier point: Make sharing as easy as possible for your guests, fans, and employees.ГӮ

While itГўВҖВҷs a nice thought that people will take the time out of their day to create custom social media copy, research your show links on their own time, or dig up old posts to make sure theyГўВҖВҷre including your hashtag, the hard reality is that people are busy and are probably not going to go through all the extra effort.ГӮ

Instead of assuming that your guests, employees, and listeners will actively promote your episodes, provide them with easy options for sharing. This can include things like social media copy, platform-specific assets, what hashtags to use, and details of who to tag including their @s.

**Quill Tip:** Is guest preparation stressing you out? Learn how to become your guestГўВҖВҷs favorite host in our complete guide on [podcast guest prep](https://www.quillpodcasting.com/blog-posts/branded-podcast-guests).

ГўВҖВҚ

## **5. Not leveraging podcast reviews and ratings**

While podcast reviews and ratings are great on their own, many podcast marketers miss out on actually putting them to use.ГӮ

ItГўВҖВҷs heavily debated as to whether podcast reviews truly impact [podcast charts](https://www.cohostpodcasting.com/resources/podcast-rankings) (we believe they do), we do know that podcast reviews and ratings can be repurposed in the following ways:

So although you hear it on pretty much every podcast, make sure you ask your audience to rate and review the show on Apple Podcasts. Being able to build a base of positive reviews will bring a myriad of benefits to your show.ГӮ

**Quill Tip:** Thomas McKinlay of Ariyh found that seeing one negative review, among positive reviews, is enough to make people [42% less likely to buy a product](https://ariyh.beehiiv.com/p/the-big-impact-of-one-negative-review). We believe this can also be applied to podcast reviews and ratings. So ensure that when a potential listener lands on your podcast, theyГўВҖВҷre seeing positive messages about your show.ГӮ

ГўВҖВҚ

## **6. Discarding paid promotion tacticsГӮ**

We all know that quality branded podcasts donГўВҖВҷt come without spend; however, many marketers are hesitant to put any additional budget out post-launch after theyГўВҖВҷve already invested in a [podcast agency](https://www.quillpodcasting.com/blog-posts/best-podcast-agency) to produce the show.ГӮ

While organic tactics work very well when it comes to increasing awareness, discoverability, and brand recognition, sometimes they fail to push the needle when it comes to [conversions](https://www.cohostpodcasting.com/resources/branded-podcast-conversions) and [monetization](https://www.cohostpodcasting.com/resources/how-to-monetize-a-podcast).ГӮ

WeГўВҖВҷre not condoning the ГўВҖВңspray and pray approachГўВҖВқ (actuallyГўВҖВҰ we kind of are), there are many strategic, targeted paid opportunities for marketers to leverage for their branded podcast.

Here are some of our favorites:

ГўВҖВҚ

## **7. Not focusing on podcast SEO**

ItГўВҖВҷs safe to say that youГўВҖВҷre likely an SEO pro, but unlike traditional web content, optimizing a podcast can be a bit elusive.ГӮ

The audiosphere hasn't always been closely linked with SEO practices, primarily because search engines couldn't readily index audio content. That was until [mid-2019 when Google began scanning audio files](https://castos.com/seo-for-podcasts/) for relevance, marking an exciting new territory for podcasts and content marketing.

There are many ways to go about optimizing your podcast for SEO, but here are a few that marketers shouldnГўВҖВҷt skip:

**Quill Tip:** We take a deep dive into [podcast SEO](https://www.cohostpodcasting.com/resources/podcast-seo) in our complete guide that encompasses everything you need to know for a successful branded podcast SEO strategy. From keyword research and optimizing metadata to creating transcriptions and blog posts, weГўВҖВҷve got you covered in becoming a podcast marketing expert.ГӮ

ГўВҖВҚ

## **8. Not tracking podcast performanceГӮ**

So, youГўВҖВҷve nailed down all these PR features, diversified your [podcast marketing](https://www.quillpodcasting.com/blog-posts/podcast-marketing) mix, and launched a new campaign for your showГўВҖВҷs latest season, but whatГўВҖВҷs the use if you donГўВҖВҷt understand the impact and [ROI](https://www.cohostpodcasting.com/resources/how-to-calculate-podcast-roi)?

Here are some ways [podcast performance tracking](https://www.cohostpodcasting.com/resources/podcast-tracking) guides decision-making:

### **Understanding audience behavior:**

**ГўВҖВҚ**Podcast tracking tools like [CoHost](https://www.cohostpodcasting.com) allow you to analyze listener behavior, such as the number of downloads, plays, and episode completion rates. This information helps you comprehend what content resonates most with your audience, allowing you to tailor future episodes to their preferences and interests.

### **Measuring listener demographics:**

Podcast analytics like [Advanced Audience Demographics](https://www.cohostpodcasting.com/feature/advanced-audience-demographics) or [B2B Analytics](https://www.cohostpodcasting.com/feature/b2b-analytics) provide data on listener demographics, such as age, location, income, gender, pets, social media usage and behavior, lifestyle, hobbies, and companies that are listening. Understanding your audience helps you verify youГўВҖВҷre reaching the right target demographic and customize podcast content to cater to your ideal listener.ГӮ

### **Evaluating marketing strategies:**

**ГўВҖВҚ**Using [Tracking Links](https://www.cohostpodcasting.com/feature/tracking-links), you can assess the effectiveness of various marketing channels by tracking your download sources. By examining the impact of social media promotions, email campaigns, or cross-promotions with other creators, you can optimize your marketing budget and concentrate on channels that yield the best results.

### **Monitoring listener feedback:**

**ГўВҖВҚ**Monitoring reviews, comments, and listener feedback is crucial for improving your podcast. Podcast tracking enables you to gather feedback from multiple platforms and gain valuable insights into what your audience appreciates and what aspects need improvement.

### **Comparing performance with benchmarks:**

**ГўВҖВҚ**By [tracking industry benchmarks](https://www.cohostpodcasting.com/resources/benchmarks-to-measure-podcast-performance) and comparing your podcast's performance against them, you can identify areas for improvement and set realistic goals for growth.

ГўВҖВҚ

## **Content marketing pro turned podcast marketing pro**

Remember, podcast marketing isn't just about getting the word out; it's an ongoing process that requires innovation, adaptability, and a deep understanding of your audience.

And perhaps more importantly, donГўВҖВҷt be afraid of making the occasional misstep.ГӮ

Marketing, like any other creative pursuit, thrives on trial and error. Embrace the lessons learned from your mistakes and use them to refine your strategies. In the end, success in podcast marketing, like podcasting itself, is a journey where adaptability and experimentation can lead to impressive results.ГӮ

And although itГўВҖВҷs a different and likely new medium, remember that youГўВҖВҷre a seasoned marketer. Think of the podcast like you would any other product or service youГўВҖВҷre promoting.ГӮ

If youГўВҖВҷre looking to spruce up your podcast marketing strategies, [reach out to our team](https://www.quillpodcasting.com/contact-us)!ГӮ

## **Podcast marketing for branded showsГӮ**

With the rise of [branded podcasts](https://www.quillpodcasting.com/blog-posts/branded-podcast), thereГўВҖВҷs an additional channel for marketers to add to their plate: [podcast marketing](https://www.quillpodcasting.com/blog-posts/podcast-marketing).ГӮ

Podcast marketing is a newer concept to marketers and creators, and because of this, it can be confusing to know what tactics leverage and what ones to leave at the door when it comes to growing a show.ГӮ

ГўВҖВңFor brands with podcasts, creating the content is just the first step. ItГўВҖВҷs unlikely that people are actively searching for the podcast youГўВҖВҷre creating so you need to get it in front of them. Podcast marketing ensures your content reaches its intended audience effectively. In todayГўВҖВҷs marketing landscape, itГўВҖВҷs the brands that know how to create quality content, strategically position that content in front of their target audience, and then keep that audience coming back for more, that win.ГўВҖВқ

[Alison Osborne, VP of Marketing at Quill and CoHost](https://www.quillpodcasting.com/team/alison-osborne)

To help marketing teams out, our team at Quill Podcast Agency put together a list of 8 common branded podcast marketing mistakes we see shows making and also how to fix them.ГӮВ ГӮ

## **1. Releasing press releases without an audio player**

Picture this: You've painstakingly crafted a compelling press release for your latest episode or season release. It's picked up by numerous outlets and even featured in mainstream publications.

Then, it all comes crashing down with the last line: "Find the show wherever you get your podcasts." WhatГўВҖВҷs missing? An embedded audio player!ГӮ

With the average human attention span steadily decreasing to [8.25 seconds](https://www.goldenstepsaba.com/resources/average-attention-span#:~:text=The%20average%20attention%20span%20of,span%20while%20using%20mobile%20devices.) (thatГўВҖВҷs nearly one second **less** than a goldfish), marketers need to make their CTAs as effortless as possible.ГӮ

That means, (when given the option) allow your audience to listen to your podcast right then and there. Offer a sneak peek, ideally a trailer, on your website and in press releases to eliminate barriers to sampling your content.

Or at the very least ensure that youГўВҖВҷve linked out to the listening apps where readers can tune in. DonГўВҖВҷt make them open the app themselves to search for you because they likely wonГўВҖВҷt.ГӮ

ГўВҖВҚ

## **8. Not tracking podcast performanceГӮ**

So, youГўВҖВҷve nailed down all these PR features, diversified your [podcast marketing](https://www.quillpodcasting.com/blog-posts/podcast-marketing) mix, and launched a new campaign for your showГўВҖВҷs latest season, but whatГўВҖВҷs the use if you donГўВҖВҷt understand the impact and [ROI](https://www.cohostpodcasting.com/resources/how-to-calculate-podcast-roi)?

### **Comparing performance with benchmarks:**

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

enriched_points.expanded_content: Traditional advertising methods, like radio and TV spots, are increasingly overlooked by audiences, making it essential for podcasters to explore innovative marketing strategies to capture attention.
Listeners today seek genuine interactions with creators. Building authentic relationships fosters trust and loyalty, essential for retaining a dedicated podcast audience in a saturated market.
Social media platforms are critical for reaching wider audiences. Without effective social media engagement, podcasts may struggle to grow their listener base and visibility.
